stemHtml: During day time the range of an NDB depends on…

options.a: The power output, the altitude of the aircraft and the elevation of the NDB.
options.b: The power output and the nature of the earth’s surface over which the ground wave travels.
options.c: The ionospheric refraction index, the altitude of the pertaining ionospheric layer, the wave length and the power output.
options.d: The atmospheric refraction index, the wave length, the elevation of the NDB and the power output.
